message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam actor {
  BackgroundColor<<ERD>> #EAEAEA
  BackgroundColor<<UML>> #EAEAEA
}
skinparam rectangle {
  BackgroundColor<<ERD>> #EAEAEA
  BackgroundColor<<UML>> #EAEAEA
}
skinparam database {
  BackgroundColor<<ERD>> #EAEAEA
  BackgroundColor<<UML>> #EAEAEA
}

actor "viewer" as viewer1
rectangle "Application" as app1
database "DB" as db1

actor "viewer" as viewer2
rectangle "Application" as app2
database "DB" as db2

viewer1 -> app1 : getListReservedTicket()
activate app1
app1 -> db1 : getListReservedTicket()
activate db1
db1 --> app1 : ListReservedTicket
deactivate db1
deactivate app1

@enduml
```
